tips.lucidity: Mental clarity. Low lucidity → madness, violence.
tips.hope: Will to continue. Low hope → catatonia, shutdown.
tips.hunger: Food need. Accumulates over time. Death at 100.
tips.thirst: Water need. Accumulates faster than hunger. Death at 100.
tips.exhaustion: Fatigue. Auto-sleeps at rest areas when high.
tips.bookIndex: Which book in the gallery they're currently examining (0–199).
tips.gallery progress: Books checked in the current gallery (200 total).
tips.patience: Galleries the NPC can search before needing a break. Higher for patient, open NPCs.
tips.prior faith: Religion in life. Determines how hard the Zoroastrian revelation hits.
tips.devotion: How devout they were in life. Higher = harder the faith crisis.
tips.faith crisis: How far their prior faith has crumbled. Grows over time.
tips.faithCrisis: How far their prior faith has crumbled. Grows over time.
tips.acceptance: How much they've accepted the Zoroastrian reality of this place.
tips.undecided: Haven't committed to a worldview yet.
tips.seeker: Accepted the rules. Searching for their book with purpose.
tips.direite: God spoke — scourge them. Meaning through violence.
tips.nihilist: Nothing means anything. Precursor to catatonia.
tips.holdout: Clinging to prior faith. "This is a test from God."
tips.temperament: Stress response. Withdrawn (0) ↔ volatile (1). Volatile → madness. Withdrawn → despair.
tips.pace: Tolerance for staying put. Patient (0) ↔ restless (1).
tips.openness: How readily they let people in. Guarded (0) ↔ open (1).
tips.outlook: How they frame being here. Accepting (0) ↔ resistant (1).
tips.fam: Familiarity — time spent together. Grows with proximity.
tips.aff: Affinity — how they feel about each other. Can go negative.
tips.calm: Functional. Lucidity and hope both adequate.
tips.catatonic: Hope collapsed. Unresponsive. May not recover.
tips.inspired: Divinely inspired. On a pilgrimage to find their book.
tips.endurance: Physical resilience. Slows hunger, thirst, exhaustion. 3d6 (3–18).
tips.influence: Social force. Scales pressure, companion restoration, affinity gain. 3d6 (3–18).
tips.quickness: Speed. Movement probability, search speed, grab chance. 3d6 (3–18).
tips.intent: Current goal. Chosen by utility scoring each tick.
tips.cooldown: Ticks before the arbiter can switch behaviors.
tips.witnessChasm: Saw someone fall into the chasm. Permanent scar.
tips.foundBody: Stumbled on a body. Numbs with repetition.
tips.groupDissolved: Their group fell apart. Decays over days.
tips.witnessEscape: Saw someone escape. Hopeful. Fades slowly.
tips.foundWords: Found words in a book. Brief wonder.
tips.witnessMadness: Watched someone lose their mind. Permanent floor.
tips.companionMad: Someone close went mad. Permanent scar.
tips.beingKilled: Died and came back. Terrifying, then routine.
tips.beingDismissed: Abandoned or rejected. Pure hope damage.
tips.committingViolence: Killed someone. Costs clarity and hope.

narrate.dead: They are dead. They will return at dawn.

disposition.inspired: They have seen where their book is.

stance.holdout: They still believe this is a test from God.
stance.seeker: They have accepted the rules. They are looking for their book.
stance.nihilist: They have stopped believing in anything.

intent.return_home: They are heading home for the night.
intent.pilgrimage: They are on a pilgrimage to find their book.
intent.socialize: They are talking with someone nearby.
